label: Impact sound type
description: Groups a SoundDef for damage impacts. Referenced by DamageDef.impactSoundType to play a hit sound on projectile or melee impact.

playOnlyIfHitPawn.label: Play only if hit pawn
playOnlyIfHitPawn.description: If true, the impact sound only plays when the target is a pawn.

soundDef.label: Sound def
soundDef.description: SoundDef played when this impact type triggers.
